permission.read: auth.uid != null && (doc.userId == auth.uid || doc.friendUserId == auth.uid || auth.role == 'admin')

userId.description: Owner of this row — queries 'list my friends' run as where({ userId: me }).

friendUserId.description: Counterparty uid. After accept, a mirror row exists where userId / friendUserId are swapped.

status.description: pending while awaiting response; accepted once the target responds; rejected kept for history.

requestedBy.description: Original requester uid. Both rows after accept carry the same requestedBy so 'who asked first' survives the mirror.

createdAt.description: Server ms-epoch when this row was inserted. Mirror rows carry the accept timestamp, not the original request.

updatedAt.description: Server ms-epoch of the last status flip.
